g.text: 1 | Reliability | Ensure final ACK (4) reaches passive closer
2 | Drainage | Allow delayed segments to expire in network
3 | Security | Prevent 'Old Duplicate' packets from new connection
4 | Standard | Duration set to 2 * Maximum Segment Lifetime

div.p: If both sides send FIN at once:

ol.li: Both receive FIN and enter CLOSING
Both receive ACK and enter TIME_WAIT

div.p: Rule: FIN occupies exactly 1 byte of sequence space. If FIN is sent with seq=U, the ACK must be U+1. This ensures that the FIN itself is reliably acknowledged even if no data is present in the segment.
